content_sections.heading: CGSSB Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Chhattisgarh Staff Selection Board (CGSSB) Recruitment 2026 notification released for posts of Assistant Grade-3 / Process Writer. Candidates with Diploma, 12TH Can Apply Online. The Online application process for CGSSB Recruitment 2026 has started on 01-07-2026 and will remain open until 24-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CGSSB website, cgstate.gov.in.

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The CGSSB Assistant Grade-3 / Process Writer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 01-07-2026 at cgstate.gov.in. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.
